CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "TBR - Tissue Biomarker Reagents") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "TBR - Tissue Biomarker Reagents") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "TBR - Tissue Biomarker Reagents"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "TBR - Tissue Biomarker Reagents"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "TBR"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "66-TBR")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-TBR
